nasb.text: So the anger of the Lord burned against Israel, and He said, “Because this nation has transgressed My covenant which I commanded their fathers and has not listened to My voice,

esv.text: So the anger of the Lord was kindled against Israel, and he said, “Because this people have transgressed my covenant that I commanded their fathers and have not obeyed my voice,

cnv.text: 於是耶和華的怒氣向以色列人發作，說：“因為這國的人違背我吩咐他們列祖的約，不聽從我的話，

ccb.text: 耶和华向他们发怒，说：“这百姓违背了我跟他们祖先所立的约，不听从我的话。
